hero.title: Precision Tire Valves

features.title: Why N.S.-LIN
features.iso_desc: Quality management system certified by AFAQ, ensuring consistent product quality.
features.standards_desc: Products meet TRA (US), ETRTO (EU), and JATMA (Japan) specifications.
features.oem_desc: Custom valve design and manufacturing to your exact specifications.
features.experience_desc: Four decades of tire valve R&D and manufacturing expertise.

categories.title: Product Lines
categories.bicycle_desc: Presta & Schrader valves, caps, extenders, and adapters for tubeless bicycle rims.
categories.tpms_desc: 15 aftermarket models for tire pressure monitoring systems.
categories.automotive_desc: 13 models in snap-in and clamp-in configurations.
